description: Sacred powers drawn from divine conviction - blessings, righteous judgment, unbreakable oaths, and the authority to command spirits.
abilities: Banish
A flash of blinding light and a sound like shattering glass casts a spirit into a distant shadow plane. With enough conviction, the banishment is permanent.
Blazing Avenger
A held weapon imbued with divine flame by reciting a personal ideal. It glows faintly, flares near enemies, and strikes with extraordinary force.
Compel Truth
A gaze that ignites like blue flame, compelling truthful answers. Strong-willed targets may resist, and failure turns the compulsion back on the caster.
Declare
A declaration grounded in personal ideals steels resolve. Enough to strike a foe, compel an explanation, or convince common folk to vacate the area.
Fiery Avenger
A phrase of power ignites a held weapon in magical flame of any color. Strikes land harder as firelight spills across the surrounding area.
Lawbringer
A spectral warhammer crackling with blue-green light, trailing a deep hum. A devastating strike releases a thunderous boom that rattles the bones of everything nearby.
Liberate
A hand placed on a creature channels devotion to permanently cure a character flaw. Guilt from past failings dissolves, as though forgiven by a higher authority.
Petition
A structured prayer during rest: invocation, humble request, adulation. Upon completion, warmth floods through as wounds close and broken bones knit together.
Rebuke
A righteous word sends a spectral clone rushing forward, knocking an advancing creature back and halting its charge before it arrives.
Sacrifice
Hands laid on the dead bring them back, provided the body remains mostly intact. Each use withers the caster's soul. Too many, and there is no return.
Smite
A word of condemnation engulfs a creature in radiant flame, obliterating body and spirit. Destroying a soul risks binding its dark remnant in the caster's mind.
Vow
A permanent bond in service of an ideal. Devotion sworn, someone named to protect, a past wrong confessed. Betraying the vow brings sharp pain and lasting cost.
Wraith
At death's edge, the body slips into an ethereal form. Translucent, ghostly, immune to physical harm yet terribly vulnerable to magic. Returning is voluntary.
